name: XGIMI MoGo 2 Pro 400 Lumens 1080p Full HD
description: The Xgimi MoGo 2 Pro projector is designed for convenient home entertainment whenever and wherever you need it. The built-in stereo speakers and available audio outputs, including Bluetooth, means you will never be without sound.

features.Key Features :: 400 ISO Lumens Bright | 1920 x 1080 Full HD Resolution | HDR10 Support | 1.2:1 Throw Ratio | HDMI 2.0 & USB-A 2.0 Inputs | Auto Focus & Keystone | Google Assistant & Chromecast Built In | Dual 8W Integrated Speakers | 3.5mm & Bluetooth Audio Output | Dual-Band Wi-Fi (802.11 a/b/g/n/ac)
features.What's in the box?: Xgimi MoGo 2 Pro 400-Lumen Full HD Portable DLP Wireless Projector | Remote Control | 2 x AAA Battery | Power Cord
